meta.title: Integration Loop: Replace with the dependency

lifecycle.note: Review producer and consumer packets before continuing the loop.

blocks.title: Replace with the producer and consumer goal
blocks.lede: A bounded producer/consumer loop for testing a dependency through real adoption and sending structured findings back upstream.

blocks.title: Loop endpoints
rows: Owns packets, cycle control, and stop conditions.

steps.title: Prepare dependency
steps.body: Producer emits version, source ref, tarball, or workspace link.

steps.title: Integrate
steps.body: Consumer adopts it in real product work and records evidence.

steps.title: Report
steps.body: Consumer emits blockers, logs, docs gaps, missing APIs, and proposed changes.

steps.title: Fix or defer
steps.body: Producer responds with accepted fixes, new ref, and retry instructions.

steps.title: Retry or close
steps.body: Consumer reruns against the new ref or the orchestrator closes the loop.

candidates.title: Integration report
candidates.summary: Consumer findings from the current cycle.
candidates.body: Record tested version/source ref, install steps, touched areas, failing commands, logs, blockers, workarounds, and requested producer changes.

candidates.title: Upstream response
candidates.body: Record fixed, rejected, deferred, or docs-only findings, plus commits, new source refs, migration notes, verification, and retry guidance.
